expectations.text: Output is valid JSON parseable by json.loads
Top-level JSON contains case, parties, events, relationships, disputes, sources, lanes
Captures BOTH meeting dates — Smith's May 3, 2024 version and the documentary May 10, 2024 version — as separate Events
Encodes the conflict either as a Dispute linking the two versions OR as a 'contradicts' Relationship between Smith's testimony and the email evidence (or both)
Captures Smith's testimony that 'no emails relating to scheduling existed' and contradicts it with Ex. 4 (which is exactly such an email)
Source citations preserve deposition line-range format (e.g., 'Smith Dep. 88:5-10', not 'page 88')
Captures the removal notice sent date — Smith testifies May 6 but Ex. 7 says May 13
